# pexip_infinity_google_auth_server (Resource)

Manages a Google OAuth 2.0 auth server with the Infinity service. Google auth servers enable OAuth 2.0 authentication integration with Google services for user authentication and authorization within Pexip Infinity.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_google_auth_server" "example" {
  name             = "Google OAuth Client"
  application_type = "WEB_APP"
  client_id        = "123456789-abcdef.apps.googleusercontent.com"
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `application_type` (String) The application type of this Google OAuth 2.0 Credential. Valid choices: PEXIP_ANDROID, WEB_APP, ANDROID, IOS, OTHER.
- `name` (String) The name used to refer to this Google OAuth 2.0 Credential. Maximum length: 250 characters.

### Optional

- `client_id` (String) The client ID of this Google OAuth 2.0 Credential. Maximum length: 250 characters.
- `client_secret` (String, Sensitive) The Google OAuth 2.0 client secret. This field is sensitive.
- `description` (String) A description of the Google OAuth 2.0 Credential. Maximum length: 250 characters.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource URI for the Google authentication server in Infinity.
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the Google auth server in Infinity
